name: R8左轮手枪 | 镶嵌装饰
nameZh: R8左轮手枪 | 镶嵌装饰
descriptionEn: The R8 Revolver delivers a highly accurate and powerful round at the expense of a lengthy trigger-pull. Firing rapidly by fanning the hammer may be the best option when point-blank stopping power is required. It has been custom painted to resemble acanthus engravings and a marble grip. Opulence in the palm of your hand
descriptionZh: R8左轮手枪有着高度精准且极具杀伤力的子弹，但代价是扳机拉动时间较长。在需要近距离火力压制的情况下，用手扳动击锤快速射击或许是最佳选择。 这把武器采用了类似于茛苕叶雕刻图案和大理石把手进行了自定义涂装。 掌心的财富
